why: CHART: exhaustion-V reversal off the 7408 negative-gamma flush low; impulsive bounce reclaimed both 7420 and 7430 barneys, 5-min momentum turned positive and is building (+0.26%), targeting VWAP reclaim (7451) then the 7480 highs. GEX CONFIRM: a growing pika FLOOR at 7425 (+8.9M, 1mDelta+0.2) sits right under price giving tight invalidation, and there is clear air overhead to the next node at 7500 (no wall). Invalidation = loss of 7425 pika floor.

Invalidation hit: price lost the 7425 pika floor (now 7424.7) and that node flipped to overhead resistance (+10M), with the next floor an air-pocket down at 7375. Momentum turned negative (5-min -0.11%); the bounce-to-VWAP thesis broke. Exiting fast per plan, small loss, rather than hoping for a reclaim in a negative-gamma air pocket.

CHART: climactic 3-candle flush (7422->7406->7399->7385->7375) into a new day low that tagged the 7375 floor exactly = exhaustion of the down-move; mean-reversion long targeting the 7420 barney (45 pts) then VWAP 7441. GEX CONFIRM (strong): price is sitting on the 7375 pika floor (+9.2M) and net near-spot gamma surged to POSITIVE +37M (levels hold / pins) = regime now actively supports the floor rather than fighting it, with clear air up to the 7420 barney. Invalidation = decisive break below 7375/7370.

Invalidation hit: price sliced through the 7375 floor to 7366.5 (below my 7370 line) and the floor stepped down to 7350, momentum still strongly negative (5-min -0.54%) with no bounce candle. I caught the knife one minute early. My specific level failed, so I exit fast per plan and take the small loss rather than move the stop down and hope for 7350.

CHART: persistent all-day downtrend (LH+LL); decisive break-flush out of the collapsed 7375 positive-gamma pin drove price to a 7318 day-low, and it is now COILING at the lows for 3+ minutes WITHOUT the sharp V-bounce seen on every earlier flush = distribution/continuation, not reversal. Target 7280 then structural 7230. GEX CONFIRM: positive gamma eroded from +48M to +22M (levels no longer holding, approaching the flip that fuels trends) and the GEX king/center-of-mass collapsed all the way down to 7230 = structure points lower; overhead 7360 pika caps bounces, floor at 7280 is thin (+3.5M). Invalidation = reclaim above 7332 (coil high).

Thesis break: the continuation-down premise is gone. In 3 minutes the GEX king snapped from 7230 back up to 7360 and positive gamma re-strengthened +21M->+32M (floor regime re-established), while price printed a green bounce candle to 7328 (day pattern of snapbacks repeating) and momentum flipped flat/positive. The collapsed-structure reason I shorted is invalidated, so I exit fast for a small loss rather than wait to get stopped at 7332 or widen the stop.

CHART: confirmed double-bottom at 7300-7303 (tested 7302.9 then 7302.7, both held) with a green reversal candle (12:00: 7302.7->7308.7) after a deeply oversold -1.3% decline from the open = exhaustion/turn CONFIRMED (waited for the candle, not the tag this time). Mean-reversion long targeting the 7340 barney then 7360, capping the winner. GEX CONFIRM: positive gamma is strong at +32M (levels hold / floor regime) with the 7300 pika floor reasserting (+6.0M) directly under price = tight invalidation; every prior intraday bounce came from exactly this gamma-surge-at-the-floor signature. Invalidation = decisive break below 7300/7298.

Invalidation hit: 7300 broke decisively (7292.97, below my 7298 line), the floor gave way and flipped to overhead resistance (+5.7M pika), next floor an air-pocket down at 7230. The double-bottom bounce failed. Exit immediately per plan, small loss (-0.21%). Strong positive gamma (+41M) did not hold the level - the downtrend keeps winning.

CHART: CONFIRMED bounce off the 7242.88 day-low (deepest oversold of the day, -2.1% from open) - green reversal candle to 7259.2, momentum flipped positive (5-min +0.20%), higher low holding above 7250 (waited for confirmation, not the knife-tag). Capped mean-reversion scalp targeting the 7290-7300 resistance where every prior bounce topped. GEX CONFIRM (strongest of day): the 7230 pika king/floor just below is the strongest floor of the day (+17.8M, vs the +6M floor that failed my last long), and positive gamma peaked at +61M into the low (now +45M) = powerful dealer defense at the extreme. Invalidation = break below 7242 (the confirmed low). Cap into 7290-7300.

CAP the winner into the opposing node. Price reached 7289.7 at the 7300 pika resistance (+11.3M) - the exact zone where every prior bounce today topped and reversed hard. Per the method, 0DTE winners round-trip, so I bank the +0.44% gain (best of the day) into the 7290-7300 wall rather than risk a give-back for a few more points. Long from 7257.95, confirmed-bounce-off-strongest-floor thesis played out.
